tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: U-D confirmation: no script auto-advances current_phase after Phase 1 completes. check-phase-gate.sh prints 'Phase gates consistent.' but leaves current_phase at 0. Manual jq write was required to set current_phase=2 to begin Build Loop. Severity Medium (known-open prior-sweep bug).

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after Phase 1 completes
framework_bugs.reproduction: After completing all 5 PHASE1_STEPS via process-checklist.sh --complete-step, run scripts/check-phase-gate.sh; observe current_phase still 0.
framework_bugs.expected: Some documented script advances .current_phase to 2 once Phase 1 steps + gate pass.
framework_bugs.actual: check-phase-gate.sh only reports consistency — does not write. Operator must hand-edit phase-state.json. Same as U-D from 2026-04-25 sweep.

tests.name: pending_approval_sentinel_respected
tests.details: Wrote .claude/pending-approval.json before upgrade. upgrade-project.sh --to-production exited 1 with '[FAIL] upgrade blocked — pending user decision.' (PR #17 U-F fix holds).

tests.name: upgrade_command_exits_zero
tests.details: After clearing the sentinel, upgrade-project.sh --to-production exited 1. The upgrade core (writing phase-state.json, tool-preferences.json, CLAUDE.md, PROJECT_INTAKE.md, APPROVAL_LOG.md and committing 'chore(upgrade): POC -> production') completed and printed 'Upgrade Complete'. The script then continued through post-upgrade verify-install + UAT migration steps, then aborted at '[STEP] Refreshing framework helper scripts (BL-009, BL-015)' due to BSD cp on macOS returning non-zero when source==destination ('cp: scripts/pending-approval.sh and .../scripts/pending-approval.sh are identical (not copied).') and set -euo pipefail aborting. See Critical bug entry.

tests.name: phase_state_preserved
tests.details: .current_phase still 2 after upgrade (correct; upgrade is poc_mode change not phase advancement). .project unchanged.

tests.name: process_state_preserved
tests.details: build_loop history preserved (steps_completed reset by --record-feature is expected); .features_completed still ['uat-feat-1'].

tests.name: new_required_artifacts_listed
tests.details: Upgrade output: 'POC constraints removed. This project is now production-ready. Review CLAUDE.md for any remaining POC references; Review PROJECT_INTAKE.md Section 8 governance fields.'

tests.name: upgrade_changelog_present_in_script
tests.details: scripts/upgrade-project.sh header (lines 7-22) explicitly lists BL-006, BL-015, BL-016 changelog entries.

tests.name: no_template_placeholders_in_output
tests.details: grep -E '__PROJECT_NAME__|__PLATFORM__|__LANGUAGE__|__TRACK__' /tmp/uat-83-upgrade.log returned zero hits. U-I not triggered for this scenario.

tests.name: poc_mode_cleared_post_upgrade
tests.details: .claude/phase-state.json post-upgrade has poc_mode removed (was 'sponsored_poc'); .deployment still 'organizational'; .last_upgrade='2026-04-25'.

framework_bugs.summary: upgrade-project.sh aborts on BSD-cp self-copy when refreshing helper scripts
framework_bugs.reproduction: From a project created by init.sh (which already places scripts/pending-approval.sh and scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh), run scripts/upgrade-project.sh --to-production. The post-upgrade '[STEP] Refreshing framework helper scripts (BL-009, BL-015)' block at scripts/upgrade-project.sh:1469-1480 runs `cp "$SCRIPT_DIR/$helper" "scripts/$helper"` for pending-approval.sh and lint-uat-scenarios.sh. Because the script is invoked AS scripts/upgrade-project.sh in the project, $SCRIPT_DIR resolves to the project's scripts/ directory — making source == destination. macOS BSD cp errors with 'cp: ... and ... are identical (not copied).' and returns non-zero. set -euo pipefail at line 2 then aborts the whole script.
framework_bugs.expected: Helper-script refresh should be a no-op (or skipped with a print_info) when source and destination are the same path. Upgrade-project.sh should exit 0 and print 'Upgrade complete.' (line 1494).
framework_bugs.actual: upgrade-project.sh exits 1; '[OK] Upgrade complete.' (line 1494) never prints. Core upgrade steps (phase-state.json/tool-preferences.json/CLAUDE.md/PROJECT_INTAKE.md updates and the 'chore(upgrade): POC -> production' git commit) complete BEFORE the abort, so state is left in a half-finalized condition: the upgrade is logically applied but post-upgrade validation does not run, and any caller depending on the script's exit code will treat a successful upgrade as a failure. Suggested fix: replace the `cp` with `cmp -s SRC DST || cp SRC DST` (or `if [ "$SCRIPT_DIR/$helper" != "$PWD/scripts/$helper" ]; then cp ...; fi`) at scripts/upgrade-project.sh:1473.

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: git grep for password|api_key|secret|token in committed files only matched docs/reference/builders-guide.md and cli-setup-addendum.md, both with placeholder 'your-app-password' literal in BITBUCKET_APP_PASSWORD env-var documentation. No real secrets.

tests.name: no_orphaned_tempfiles

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD == d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (matches starting SHA). git status --short shows only pre-existing untracked .claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ entries unrelated to this agent's work. Framework was not modified.

summary: Init non-interactive succeeded for sponsored_poc/mcp_server/standard; baseline build through Phase 2 (1 feature) succeeded; upgrade --to-production applied state changes correctly but the script aborts (rc=1) on a BSD-cp self-copy in the post-upgrade helper-refresh block — Critical regression. U-D (no auto phase advance) confirmed Medium. Doc gaps: mcp_server lacks both release-pipeline template and platform module.
